title: hermas intermedia
intro: Hermas intermedia, also known as the sweet cicely or wild parsnip, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hermas intermedia include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and reduce inflammation. Hermas intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
